title: Ebenezer Screw
description: A new Christmas classic about that old cold-hearted miser, Ebenezer Screw.
quote: Are you as horny as I am?
altHero: Bob Scratchit as Ebenezer Screw, shirtless and wearing a top hat and red scarf
alt1: Tiny Johnson wearing a Santa hat
alt2: Ebenezer Screw standing in a bedroom with a lady in lingerie sitting on the bed
